== Notes for [[Item:Q104382|Q104382]] ==

Salazar y Castro seems to make her a sister of Jeronimo de Salamanca Polanco in this tree http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=53930

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076376844993

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
